session_summary:
# Real-Time Session Visualization — Design Assessment

## Verdict: **Yes, absolutely possible. ~95% of the backend is already built.**

This session conducted deep-dive explorations into the event pipeline, IPC architecture, and UI component library to produce a comprehensive architectural design. Three specialized subagents mapped every relevant file across 4 packages.

## What Already Exists (The 95%)

### Two Production SSE Endpoints
- **`GET /event`** — streams ALL Bus events as SSE (text/event-stream) with 10s heartbeat
- **`GET /global/event`** — cross-instance event stream, same format
- Both use Effect Sse.encode pipeline, SDK has full client with reconnection

### 40+ Bus Events (already streaming)
session.status, message.part.delta, file.edited, permission.asked, pty.created, tool events, lsp diagnostics, workspace status, question lifecycle... All currently available via the SSE stream.

### 27+ EventV2 Execution Events (not yet in SSE, but exists)
tool.called, tool.progress, tool.success, tool.failed, text.delta, reasoning.delta, shell.started/ended, compaction, retries... These carry the rich per-session execution detail.

### Renderer Already Consumes SSE
ServerSDKProvider in `packages/app/src/context/server-sdk.tsx` already connects to `/global/event` and delivers typed events through a reactive emitter.

### Panel Infrastructure is Mature
- SessionSidePanel (tabbed right panel with animated width transitions)
- ResizeHandle (drag-to-resize with collapse)
- StatusPopover (colored dot + popover body for real-time status)
- CSS animations throughout (no motion library needed — pure @keyframes)

## What Needs Building (The 5%)

### Backend — Coordination Bus Events (1-2 days)
4 new Bus event types: task_status, path_claimed, session_heartbeat, activity_logged
Wire publish calls in existing coordination tools.

### Renderer — Viz Components (4-7 days)
- SessionVizProvider context (filters SSE events for viz state)
- CodebaseMap (SVG package tree with CSS-animated pulse indicators)
- ActivityFeed (capped DOM list, event types with icons)
- SessionBadge (titlebar status indicators)
- Integration into SessionSidePanel (new "Viz" tab) or as floating window

## Design Artifact
Full architecture and implementation plan written to: `docs/json/opencode/plans/desktop-session-viz.v1.json`

## Two Topology Options

| Option | Pros | Cons |
|---|---|---|
| **In-window tab** (in SessionSidePanel) | Shares SSE connection, simplest, no window management | Constrained to existing layout |
| **Floating BrowserWindow** (loading-window pattern) | Fully independent, can live on 2nd monitor | Needs own SolidJS entry + SSE subscription |

## Total Effort: ~1-2 weeks for full implementation
next_steps:
## Recommended Next Session

Start with Phase 1 — Event Pipeline: Define the 4 coordination Bus event types and wire the publish points. This is the gating dependency for everything else and has zero risk (no existing code modified).

The full plan is at `docs/json/opencode/plans/desktop-session-viz.v1.json` with implementation phases, file-by-file changes, and dependency breakdown.

findings.summary: Renderer already consumes /global/event SSE stream via ServerSDKProvider. 6 main→renderer push channels exist. Two topology options: in-window tab in SessionSidePanel or separate BrowserWindow.

Two SSE endpoints exist (/event, /global/event). 40+ Bus event types. EventV2 has 27+ execution detail events (tool.called, text.delta, reasoning.delta). Coordination is DB-only — needs Bus event definitions added.
No motion library — all animations are CSS @keyframes. No graph viz deps. No virtual list. SessionSidePanel tabbed panel + ResizeHandle + StatusPopover are the patterns to extend. SVG DOM for graph.
